'''竏喃-sh-f-l''' ('''kafashfeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:embattail|embattail]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-f-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:embattail|embattail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喃-sh-f-l
|-
! Lemma
| kafashfeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifashfeloko|thifashfeloko]] || [[word:jifashfeloko|jifashfeloko]] || [[word:shifashfeloko|shifashfeloko]] || [[word:kifashfeloko|kifashfeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufashfeloko|thuthufashfeloko]] || [[word:jujufashfeloko|jujufashfeloko]] || [[word:shushufashfeloko|shushufashfeloko]] || [[word:kukufashfeloko|kukufashfeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufashfeloko|thufashfeloko]] || [[word:jufashfeloko|jufashfeloko]] || [[word:shufashfeloko|shufashfeloko]] || [[word:kufashfeloko|kufashfeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufashfeloko|thufashfeloko]] || [[word:jufashfeloko|jufashfeloko]] || [[word:shufashfeloko|shufashfeloko]] || [[word:kufashfeloko|kufashfeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefashfeloko|thefashfeloko]] || [[word:jefashfeloko|jefashfeloko]] || [[word:shefashfeloko|shefashfeloko]] || [[word:kefashfeloko|kefashfeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofashfeloko|thothofashfeloko]] || [[word:jojofashfeloko|jojofashfeloko]] || [[word:shoshofashfeloko|shoshofashfeloko]] || [[word:kokofashfeloko|kokofashfeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofashfeloko|thofashfeloko]] || [[word:jofashfeloko|jofashfeloko]] || [[word:shofashfeloko|shofashfeloko]] || [[word:kofashfeloko|kofashfeloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofashfeloko|thofashfeloko]] || [[word:jofashfeloko|jofashfeloko]] || [[word:shofashfeloko|shofashfeloko]] || [[word:kofashfeloko|kofashfeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦfashfeloko|thﾃｦfashfeloko]] || [[word:jﾃｦfashfeloko|jﾃｦfashfeloko]] || [[word:shﾃｦfashfeloko|shﾃｦfashfeloko]] || [[word:kﾃｦfashfeloko|kﾃｦfashfeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafashfeloko|thathafashfeloko]] || [[word:jajafashfeloko|jajafashfeloko]] || [[word:shashafashfeloko|shashafashfeloko]] || [[word:kakafashfeloko|kakafashfeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafashfeloko|thafashfeloko]] || [[word:jafashfeloko|jafashfeloko]] || [[word:shafashfeloko|shafashfeloko]] || [[word:kafashfeloko|kafashfeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafashfeloko|thafashfeloko]] || [[word:jafashfeloko|jafashfeloko]] || [[word:shafashfeloko|shafashfeloko]] || [[word:kafashfeloko|kafashfeloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
